notableEvents.label: Alex Call pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Alex Call singles on a fly ball to left fielder Brandon Marsh. Mookie Betts scores. Kyle Tucker scores.

notableEvents.label: Alex Call pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Alex Call grounds out, third baseman Alec Bohm to first baseman Garrett Stubbs.

notableEvents.label: Mookie Betts GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Mookie Betts grounds into a double play, shortstop Edmundo Sosa to first baseman Garrett Stubbs. Andy Pages out at 2nd. Mookie Betts out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Mookie Betts rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Mookie Betts grounds into a double play, shortstop Edmundo Sosa to first baseman Garrett Stubbs. Andy Pages out at 2nd. Mookie Betts out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Justin Crawford reaches on a throwing error by second baseman Alex Freeland.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Justin Crawford reaches on a throwing error by second baseman Alex Freeland.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run
